message:
Add implementation plan for Mutter Butter

12 tasks covering all 7 modules:
1. Extension scaffolding + GSettings schema
2. GJS test harness
3. Grid engine (pure logic + tests)
4. Stamp placer (3 strategies + tests)
5. Focus tracker (rank list + tests)
6. Scale manager (clone lifecycle)
7. Input router (stamp layer, z-ordering)
8. Drag handler (grab-op + manual stamp drag)
9. Window state handler
10. Extension orchestration (enable/disable)
11. Preferences UI
12. Final verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
